# glama-status-mcp

Daily-refreshed Glama TDQS score tracker for any MCP fleet. Scrapes per-tool grades from glama.ai, stores in SQLite with snapshot history, surfaces via MCP tools and a Vite/React web dashboard. Configurable via `config/fleet-repos.json` -- track repos from any GitHub/Glama author.

## Tools

- `glama_status` -- Portmanteau with 11 operations: list, get, worst_tools, refresh, history, staleness, report, deltas, add_repo, remove_repo, reload_config.
- `glama_scores_summary` -- Compact fleet-wide grade distribution and per-repo stats.
- `glama_daily_report` -- Full markdown daily report: grade table, score deltas, worst tools, stale repos.
- `glama_agentic_analyze(repo_name?)` -- LLM-powered analysis via ctx.sample(). Generates actionable fix todos.
- `glama_generate_reports(repo_name?)` -- Writes per-repo markdown fix-todo reports to `reports/` directory.
- `show_glama_status_card` -- Prefab card: fleet overview dashboard.
- `show_glama_repo_card(repo_name)` -- Prefab card: per-repo score breakdown with tool scores.

## Prompts

- `glama_improvement_plan(repo_name)` -- Per-tool fix priorities with 6 dimension scores.
- `glama_fleet_analysis_prompt()` -- Fleet-wide health snapshot for LLM ingestion.

## Ports

- Backend (FastAPI + MCP HTTP /mcp): 11072
- Frontend (Vite dev): 11073

## Architecture

- `src/glama_status_mcp/server.py` -- FastMCP + FastAPI (7 tools, 2 prompts, agentic sampling)
- `src/glama_status_mcp/scraper.py` -- Async HTML scraper for glama.ai
- `src/glama_status_mcp/database.py` -- SQLite with 6 tables, snapshot/delta engine
- `src/glama_status_mcp/models.py` -- Pydantic models, configurable fleet-repos.json loader
- `src/glama_status_mcp/llm.py` -- Glom-On auto-discovery + chat client
- `src/glama_status_mcp/reporting.py` -- Per-repo markdown report generator
- `webapp/` -- Vite + React + TailwindCSS v4 (6 pages, 12 components)
- `native/` -- Tauri 2.0 + NSIS installer
- `config/fleet-repos.json` -- User-editable tracked repo list

## Links

- Dashboard: http://127.0.0.1:11073
- Glama: https://glama.ai/mcp/servers
- Fleet docs: mcp-central-docs/projects/glama-status-mcp/README.md
